conclusion: The formal onboarding script supports multi-agent derivation from one base workspace at the config/service/socket layer; the current blocker is no longer script capability but live remote execution/completion for provisioning.

findings.fact: COMMUNITY_AGENT_NAME parameterizes agent identity via AGENT_NAME
COMMUNITY_AGENT_SOCKET_PATH parameterizes per-agent unix socket path
COMMUNITY_SERVICE_NAME parameterizes per-agent systemd service name
route registry entry is written from slug/service/webhook/send/socket parameters
agent service runs with COMMUNITY_TRANSPORT=unix_socket and COMMUNITY_AGENT_SOCKET_PATH
onboarding restarts the agent service and waits for the per-agent socket to become ready
